contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Diagnosed and resolved USD Treasury Balance discrepancy between landing page and /treasury/ page
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/381
  
  Details:
  ## Summary
  
  Gary noticed the USD Treasury Balance figures differed between truesight.me (landing page) and truesight.me/treasury/. 
  
  **Root cause:** The landing page reads from the Performance Statistics sheet (cached by GAS cron), while the /treasury/ page computes live. The sheet value was stale because the formula in the "off chain asset balance" sheet had an error.
  
  **Actions taken:**
  1. Gary fixed the formula in the "off chain asset balance" sheet
  2. Refreshed the treasury breakdown cache via ?type=treasury_breakdown&refresh=1
  3. Refreshed the AUM stat via ?type=recalculate_aum
  4. Synced USD_TREASURY_BALANCE to Performance Statistics via ?type=sync_treasury
  
  **Result:** Both pages now show $17,270.40 USD — in sync.
  
  **Note:** The ?type=sync_treasury endpoint already existed in the deployed GAS code (added in a previous deploy), so PR #381 was a no-op and has been closed.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh, Sophia Truesight
- TDG Issued: 50
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
